SubCraftica.CraftInProgress: SubCraftica: wait until the current craft finishes.
SubCraftica.CraftAlreadyRunning: SubCraftica: a craft request is already being processed.
SubCraftica.QueueMismatch: SubCraftica: queue expects {0}, current request is {1}.
SubCraftica.WarningNoSpaceInventoryAndSt: <color=#DF4026FF>No space in inventory or nearby storage. Queue stopped.</color>
SubCraftica.ToggleExcludeFromExtraction: Exclude this container from auto-craft extraction.
SubCraftica.TogglePreferredForSurplus: Prefer this container for auto-craft surplus when inventory is full.
SubCraftica.OptDesc_EnableAutoSubcraft: Automatically craft missing sub-recipes when needed.
SubCraftica.OptDesc_CraftingTooltipMode:
Shows available and required ingredient status for the selected recipe.
<color=#FFAC09FF>Disabled</color>
The mod crafting tooltip is hidden.
<color=#FFAC09FF>Basic</color>
Shows one compact panel with the total required ingredients.
<color=#FFAC09FF>Advanced</color>
Shows the main panel and nested subrecipe panels.
SubCraftica.OptDesc_StorageMode:
Defines where ingredients are taken from while crafting.
<color=#FFAC09FF>Disabled</color>
Uses inventory ingredients only.
<color=#FFAC09FF>Nearby</color>
Uses inventory and storages within configured range.
<color=#FFAC09FF>All (no range)</color>
Uses all loaded storages with no distance limit.
SubCraftica.OptDesc_StorageRange: Container search range in meters (used in <color=#FFAC09FF>Nearby</color> mode only).
SubCraftica.OptDesc_StorageOnlyIngredien: Color preset used when an ingredient is covered by storages but not fully by inventory.
SubCraftica.OptDesc_InventoryIngredientC: Color preset used when an ingredient is fully covered by your inventory.
SubCraftica.OptDesc_MissingIngredientCol: Color preset used when an ingredient cannot be fulfilled by inventory or storages.
SubCraftica.OptDesc_MaxUnitsPerRequest: Limit of units you can request in a single crafting action.
SubCraftica.OptDesc_CraftingMode:
Defines how each crafting request is executed.
<color=#FFAC09FF>Per-item</color>
Processes the queue by crafting one unit per cycle.
<color=#FFAC09FF>Batch</color>
Attempts to craft the requested amount in a single cycle.
<color=#FFAC09FF>Instant</color>
Completes crafting instantly when possible.
SubCraftica.OptDesc_EnergyMultiplier: Global multiplier for the energy required by each crafted recipe.
SubCraftica.OptDesc_IncludeSubrecipeEner: Include auto-crafted sub-recipe energy in total energy cost.
SubCraftica.OptDesc_ReturnSurplusToStora: When inventory is full, try to move crafted items to nearby storage. If no space is available, the queue is stopped.
SubCraftica.OptDesc_BlacklistToggle:
Controls visibility of the exclusion toggle on containers.
<color=#FFAC09FF>Disabled</color>
Hides the exclusion toggle on containers.
<color=#FFAC09FF>Enabled</color>
Shows the exclusion toggle to exclude containers from auto-crafting.
SubCraftica.OptDesc_SurplusToggle:
Controls visibility of the surplus preference toggle on containers.
<color=#FFAC09FF>Disabled</color>
Hides the surplus toggle on containers.
<color=#FFAC09FF>Enabled</color>
Shows the surplus toggle to prioritize containers for overflow crafted items.
SubCraftica.OptDesc_ResetToDefaults: Restore all SubCraftica options to their default values.
SubCraftica.OptDesc_InternalExtractionEx: Internal list of storage ids excluded from crafting extraction.
SubCraftica.OptDesc_InternalPreferredSur: Internal list of storage ids preferred for surplus crafted item storage.
SubCraftica.Opt_ResetToDefaultsDone: SubCraftica: options restored to default values.
SubCraftica.OptDesc_CreativeMode: Creative Crafting Mode only. It does not grant invulnerability and does not modify the rest of survival (hunger, thirst, oxygen, health, etc.). Crafting ignores ingredient availability in inventory and storages. All recipes are unlocked while this mode is enabled. Crafting is always instant in this mode. Energy cost is always disabled in this mode, regardless of your SubCraftica energy settings. Warning: this can break the intended game experience. Are you ready mr. hardkopy?
